svg.metadata: {"_description":"Edge case: Unicode in labels (Cyrillic, CJK, emoji, math symbols).","type":"flow","title":"unicode labels: 中文 / Кириллица / 日本語 / 🚀","nodes":[{"id":"user","label":"用户","kind":"ellipse"},{"id":"server","label":"Сервер","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"queue","label":"メッセージキュー","kind":"rectangle"},{"id":"result","label":"✅ Done","kind":"ellipse","accent":"link"}],"edges":[{"from":"user","to":"server","label":"→ запрос"},{"from":"server","to":"queue","label":"公開"},{"from":"queue","to":"result","label":"🎉"}]}
